comment: TRUSTED-HARNESS MANIFEST (plan replay-corpus-gate-2026-07 Item 4, accident-grade per the Threat-model scope decision). A byte-identical evidence WORKFLOW is not enough — the run still executes branch-controlled code, so the deterministic-evidence workflow verifies EVERY file listed here against the anchored target-branch blob before importing any branch code, and first verifies the checked-out copy of THIS manifest is byte-identical to the target-branch copy (a branch-controlled manifest could silently DROP a helper and then modify it). Keystone and fixing PRs are PROHIBITED from changing these paths (CI diff check) — harness changes land via a separate Foundation-style PR first. The broader transitive source/data import-closure analysis is the named field-replay-hardening-followups item.

direct_dependency_pins.comment: The deterministic runner's direct dependencies — the workflow runs npm ci from the lockfile, so dependency drift changes validation/timing semantics while source hashes still match (accident-class). Resolved versions/integrities are recorded in evidence from package-lock.json at run time.
